Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 654}We're visiting shrines tomorrow... Honestly, why bother?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 654}I think I'll fake sick and relax in here instead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 654}I tried to go to the girls' rooms at midnight last night, but a teacher was guarding the stairs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 654}How am I going to get up there...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 654}My bag's cluttered inside since I just threw my clothes in at random...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 654}I'd better take care not to leave any undies behind. People will wonder who left them...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 654}Especially Ekoda! I can just see him asking everyone when we gather at the station.[n]{f 1 1}
